commentaries.author: Bede
commentaries.content: Peter's discourse below (2:37-41) shows that he does not seem to give a repetition in different languages successively, but rather an immediate understandng and acceptance by the whole crowd, and that they equally grasped the apostle's words in whatever language they may have been delivered.

commentaries.author: Gregory the Theologian
commentaries.content: Was it that the speakers expressed what they had to say in the diverse discourse of every language, or, when there were hearers of diverse nations, each of them would perceive what they heard in terms of his own language and would grasp the meaning of that one and the same discourse which had been uttered by the apostle?

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
